与异种生物的战争结束后，幸存下来人们建立起钢铁要塞，他们自称幸存者。几十年弹指一挥间，再无人知晓当年究竟发生了什么，他们只能通过遗留下来的资料得知曾经的辉煌。很多人苦苦追寻，希望找出异种存在之谜，为百年消失的时代画一个句号。他叫方以言，无数幸存者的其中之一，他打算成为一名职业猎人。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc26560639c687486c4f6aa08783a189e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"壶杯","author_id":"","book_id":"7486428199828605976","book_name":"百年断层","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1850人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7486428205348291096","read_count":"1850","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1123029"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"526","tags":"科幻末世,末世,求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc26560639c687486c4f6aa08783a189e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779163723&x-signature=2ZVs%2BfiLmyNL9ZmDDp46i8fDm2E%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1349808956646359","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"41"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":20747,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24947,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2548},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1754631611,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7550371765407515417","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{}, ge_data_list":{},"text":"只希望不要完结太快，世界观似乎并不算特别庞大，但是也仍有空间。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760369208,"group_id":"7486428199828605976","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"983376768009036"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7486428199828605976","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"261"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":25767,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7560719659390124824","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"分明是为数不多以故事为卖点，而非单纯爽文的好书，可谓百里挑一的清流。没有什么特别夸张的奇遇或者外挂，靠着与其他角色的邂逅引人入胜。
主角不滥杀，甚至应当说是非常克制自己的情绪，却又不显得冷漠机械。无论从哪个角度，都可以说是温柔善良，全然不像一般的末世小说那所谓的“杀伐果断”、“利益至上”。对抗的敌人，也可以说不是通常意义上某一个大BOSS，而更应该说是一层由复杂的情感与欲望编织出的铁幕般的命运。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760368488,"group_id":"7486428199828605976","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0mBA8Jb5VyPUVPFg5X/zcI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"983376768009036","user_name":"银风逐月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"983376768009036","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7486428199828605976","book_info":{"abstract":"(成长型主角)(剧情向)(角色刻画)(无系统)(每一个字保证纯手打)
